description_long: This is a classic bolt-action military rifle with a long wooden stock and a prominent metal barrel. The rifle features a fixed wooden buttstock, a metal trigger guard, and an extended barrel with a bayonet affixed to the muzzle. The receiver and bolt assembly are visible, with a metallic finish contrasting the rich brown wood of the stock. The rifle appears to have iron sights mounted along the top of the barrel. The overall design is reminiscent of mid-20th-century service rifles, with a robust and utilitarian construction. The bayonet attachment at the front further emphasizes its military heritage.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock, metal barrel, and attached bayonet, featuring iron sights and a robust military design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, metal barrel, and attached bayonet.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and bayonet, with the stock barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, metal receiver, and the full length of the bayonet.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and bayonet, with the top of the receiver visible.
